strengths: ~20 years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems, meeting the 15-year minimum
Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks since April 2025
Proven entrepreneurial track record: founded and has sustained GISCollective as an open-source geo-data platform since 2016, with real-world adoption by Green Map
concerns: AI expertise is effectively limited to the current role (April 2025 onward, ~14 months); no prior demonstrated AI products or platforms built at scale
No evidence of director-level IC scope, strategic customer advisory, or executive-audience influence — all central to the role's responsibilities
No advanced degree in an AI-related field; the preferred Master's or PhD qualification is unmet
response.justification: The role demands a recognized AI authority with a multi-year history of shipping AI products and advising enterprise customers at director-level scope. Bogdan's AI involvement is confined to his current staff engineering position (April 2025–present), where he contributes to MCP tooling and agentic workflows — substantive work, but insufficient to establish the 'demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' the job description explicitly prioritizes. His 20-year engineering career demonstrates strong technical breadth and sound engineering discipline, and his GISCollective founding shows entrepreneurial instinct, but the resume contains no evidence of executive-level influence, cloud-platform ownership at scale, strategic customer advisory engagements, or AI thought leadership (publications, keynotes, or recognized community contributions). The gap between his current staff engineering trajectory and the director-level AI strategy profile this role requires is too large to bridge on the evidence provided.
